commit.message:
feat: intelligent reminder lead time based on task type

- Meeting/appointment: remind 30 min before (not at start time)
- Payment/bills: remind 3 days before
- Deadline/submission: remind 1 day before
- Travel/flight: remind 2 hours before
- Medical appointment: remind 1 hour before
- Other timed tasks: remind 15 min before
- No time specified: remind at 9am on due date

Also: reminder confirmation always shows actual remind time vs due time

commit.message:
Fix: sanitize publishable key — strip secret key leaked in env var

The NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY env var on Vercel contained both
the publishable key and CLERK_SECRET_KEY concatenated (newline-separated).
This caused two issues:
1. Clerk rejected the key as invalid
2. The secret key was leaked to the browser

Now we split on newlines and only use the first line (the pk_* value).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add storefront products index for SEO discovery (#624)

* Add storefront products index for SEO discovery

* perf(storefront): server-side category filtering for large catalogs

For merchants with 2000+ products, fetching everything client-side is
not viable. Now:
- ?category=X → DB filters by category (no limit, gets all matches)
- No category (home page) → limit 200 for fast initial load

searchParams flows from page.tsx → StorefrontContent → Supabase query.
Uses ilike for case-insensitive category matching.

commit.message:
fix: use Clerk Organization invitations for proper email branding (#177)

Invitation emails showed "Personal workspace" instead of the actual
organization name because the code used Clerk's generic /v1/invitations
API. This switches to Clerk Organization invitations which include the
org name in the email.

Changes:
- Added create_clerk_organization() for lazy Clerk org creation
- Added create_clerk_org_invitation() using /v1/organizations/{id}/invitations
- Added revoke_clerk_org_invitations_for_email() for org-level cleanup
- Service layer tries org invitation first, falls back to generic
- Updated resend_invitation and revoke_invitation to handle org invitations
- Clerk org IDs are stored on MongoDB organization documents (clerk_org_id)

Closes #139

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix signature matching: MINOR_VERSION in all sdef=0 lookups

Four bugs caused template matching to never run and use wrong data:

1. sd > 0 guard in matchSignatureAgainstPage blocked ALL template scoring —
   signatures always live at STRUCTURE_DEF_ID=0, so sd was always 0 and
   the condition was always false. Removed the guard entirely.

2. g_line_templates keyed by (sdef, line_id) — at sdef=0 the same LINE_ID
   carries a different TEMPLATE per MINOR_VERSION (one per signature species
   variant). Changed key to (sdef, minor_version, line_id) and updated
   loadLineTemplates to SELECT MINOR_VERSION.

3. g_field_coords keyed by (sdef, line_id, field_id) — same problem: at
   sdef=0 column positions differ per MINOR_VERSION. Changed key to
   (sdef, minor_version, line_id, field_id) and updated loadFieldCoordinates
   to SELECT MINOR_VERSION.

4. loadLinesInSign and loadSensitiveFields joined using MAX(MINOR_VERSION)
   per SIGN_ID globally — wrong because the same SIGN_ID has up to 42
   species-specific versions each with their own MINOR_VERSION and different
   LINE/FIELD sets. Fixed both to join against SIGNATURE's own MINOR_VERSION
   for the active domain and keyed their internal maps by (sign_id, minor_version).

resolveFieldCoords and collectFieldCoords updated accordingly.

commit.message:
Add cross-verse corpus search (CorpusIndex) — v1.3.9

- New `quranic_nlp/corpus.py`: flat-array index over all ~128K Quranic tokens
  - Built from morphologhy.csv in ~1–2 s; loads from disk cache in ~0.04 s
  - Per-attribute inverted numpy indexes for O(log N) lookup
  - Pattern search with SKIP (proximity), OP='?' (optional), TAG/ROOT/LEMMA/TEXT
  - Patterns freely cross verse and surah boundaries
  - CorpusMatch.refs shows which verses a match spans
  - Convenience: find_root(), find_lemma(), find_root_near_root()
- README: new "Cross-Verse Corpus Search" section with real output examples
- Colab notebook: sections 13 (VerseMatcher) and 14 (CorpusIndex) added
- Version bump to 1.3.9, published to PyPI

commit.message:
feat: implement equation CAPTCHA mode with dynamic piece animation

- Add EquationParams interface and extend EquationChallenge with
  targetT and equationParams fields in captcha-engine.ts
- Implement equationEngine.generate() using mulberry32 for params and
  LCG for image/jigsaw/targetT selection; piece extracted upright with
  dynamic safe targetT range computed from quadratic clamp point
- Add dual notch: real shadow + random fake shadow (≥80px apart) baked
  into background to mislead bots
- Piece rotates via CSS transform as slider moves (theta from equation);
  only the shadow cutout bakes the target rotation angle
- Wire equationEngine in server.ts with mode-based routing and include
  equationParams in challenge response
- Frontend: add computeEquationPos() mirroring backend math, expose
  pieceX, pieceCurrentY, pieceTheta from useCaptcha hook
- Component applies live x, y, rotate(theta) to piece image
- Update README.md and add CLAUDE.md codebase guide

feat: doceval generates full-document pages from calcmark_source

Extend cmd/doceval with a second phase that converts .cm files into
evaluated Hugo pages. Pages with `calcmark_source: <path>` in their
frontmatter trigger generation of a sibling full.md containing the
complete CalcMark document with computed results inline.

Key changes:
- format.Options gains FrontmatterAsCodeFence to render CalcMark
  frontmatter as a ```yaml code fence instead of raw --- delimiters,
  avoiding collision with Hugo's own frontmatter parsing.
- doceval skips files containing the generated marker on re-runs.
- Generated pages use _build.list: never to stay out of section
  listings and sitemaps.
- Example page bundles use _index.md (branch bundles) so Hugo allows
  sub-pages; section.html updated to render branch bundles with no
  visible children identically to regular pages.

feat(hub): add HTTP bridge for cross-machine war room coordination

Enable Mac ↔ WSL war room connectivity via HTTP bridge server.
SQLite can't be shared across filesystems, so the bridge exposes
all war room operations over REST. Remote terminals set PROWLR_HUB_URL
and the MCP server automatically routes through the bridge client.

- bridge.py: FastAPI server exposing all 13 war room operations
- remote_client.py: stdlib HTTP client (no external deps)
- mcp_server.py: auto-detects remote mode via PROWLR_HUB_URL env var
- db.py: fix check_same_thread for FastAPI thread pool compatibility
- 12 new E2E tests verifying full bridge → engine chain

commit.message:
Initial commit: ANE training engine + autoresearch integration

Training system for Apple Neural Engine combining:
- maderix/ANE: reverse-engineered ANE private APIs for neural network training
- karpathy/autoresearch: automated hyperparameter search via AI agents

Includes dynamic kernel compilation (10 MIL kernels/layer), IOSurface weight
staging, GQA support, DeepNet scaling for fp16 stability, and autoresearch
agent protocol for autonomous architecture search.

Tested: SmolLM2-360M (362M params), 1000 steps, loss ~6.0, zero NaN.

  quickstart_steps (array of {step, cmd}), similar_tools comparison objects

  with _llm_failed flag and show warning callout in notes

fix(mneme): eliminate unwrap() in native mneme code (#716)

## Summary

Eliminates all `unwrap()` calls from native mneme code
(`crates/mneme/src/` excluding `engine/`).

**Finding:** The library code was already clean — all ~759 `unwrap()`
calls were confined to `#[cfg(test)]` blocks. Each was replaced with
`.expect("descriptive message")` per project convention.

### Files changed (9 commits)

| File | Unwraps fixed | Notes |
|------|--------------|-------|
| `store.rs` | 175 | Test code only |
| `import.rs` | 99 | Test code only |
| `export.rs` | 83 | Test code only |
| `retention.rs` | 76 | Test code only |
| `backup.rs` | 73 | Test code only |
| `skill.rs` | 41 | Test code only |
| `knowledge_store.rs` | 39 | Test code only |
| `embedding.rs` | 39 | Test code only |
| `extract.rs` | 35 | Test code only |
| `knowledge.rs` | 34 | Test code only |
| `migration.rs` | 21 | Test code only |
| `portability.rs` | 12 | Test code only |
| `types.rs` | 10 | Test code only |
| `schema.rs` | 8 | Test code only |
| `query.rs` | 8 | Test code only |
| `query_rewrite.rs` | 3 | Test code only |
| `recall.rs` | 2 | Test code only |
| `hnsw_index.rs` | 1 | Test code only |
| `skills/extract.rs` | 8 | Test code only |

No new snafu error variants needed — library code was already using
proper `.context()` propagation throughout.

## Test plan

- [x] `cargo fmt --check -p aletheia-mneme` — clean
- [x] `cargo check -p aletheia-mneme` — clean
- [x] `cargo clippy -p aletheia-mneme --all-targets -- -D warnings` —
zero warnings
- [x] `cargo test -p aletheia-mneme` — 547 passed, 0 failed
- [x] Zero `unwrap()` in non-engine `crates/mneme/src/` (verified with
grep)

refactor(mneme): replace BoxErr with StorageError snafu enum in storage/ (#710)

## Summary

- Introduces `StorageError` snafu enum with five typed variants:
`TransactionFailed`, `WriteInReadTransaction`, `CorruptedData`, `Io`,
`KeyEncoding`
- Adds `StorageResult<T>` alias and converts all `Storage`/`StoreTx`
non-iterator method signatures
- Converts all four backends: redb, fjall, mem, temp — eliminating all
`bail!`/`miette!` macro calls from `engine/storage/`
- Replaces all `unwrap()` in non-test storage code with documented
`expect("reason")` calls
- Iterator-returning trait methods keep `DbResult` items at their
boundary; `StorageError → BoxErr` conversion via std blanket `From` impl
at `?` sites

## Test plan

- [x] `cargo check -p aletheia-mneme --features
mneme-engine,storage-redb` — clean
- [x] `cargo test -p aletheia-mneme --features
mneme-engine,storage-redb` — 878 passed, 0 failed
- [x] `cargo clippy -p aletheia-mneme --features
mneme-engine,storage-redb --all-targets -- -D warnings` — zero new
errors in `engine/storage/` (29 pre-existing dead_code errors in
